Petrified Heartwood Flamberge  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 39
DMG: 50 Dmg Bonus: 138 AC: 40
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +25 STA: +25 WIS: +25 INT: +25 HP: +100 MANA: +100 ENDUR: +100
SV FIRE: +15 SV COLD: +15 SV MAGIC: +15
Required level of 51.
Effect: Engulfing Roots (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: PAL SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Petrified Heartwood Flamberge
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 39
DMG: 50 Dmg Bonus: 138 AC: 40
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

SV FIRE: +15 SV COLD: +15 SV MAGIC: +15
Required level of 51.
Effect: Engulfing Roots (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: PAL SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Slashing
Light:Flameless Lantern
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Jaradis Stormcaller
Lucy Entry By:Elaenya
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 20:33:00
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Ultra Rare
Level to Attain: 60
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Plane of Growth
NPC Name
Tunare


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Growth

item window

Uploaded September 30th, 2019 by 0x808080
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 3 4 Next »
Post Comment
?
QuoteReply
# May 17 2004 at 1:32 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591790053534
42 posts
Ok I may be confused but how is this proc not Rogue or Ranger friendly I mean who cares if the mob is rooted or unrooted...

Casie
54th Rogue Povar
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=881254
▲ Page top
RE: ?
QuoteReply
# May 25 2004 at 10:24 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591795128798
Scholar
60 posts
Rangers do double damage with bow shots on stationary targets which aren't rooted. Rooting a mob which is already stationary in camp halves ranger archery damage.

Rogues tend to be up close to the mob for backstabs. When rooted, a mob will attack the closest player. If the rogue happens to be closest when the mob gets rooted, they no longer have a back to stab. It's not impossible to deal with, but it's one more thing to make the rogue's job more difficult.
▲ Page top
a
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2004 at 4:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759218933
46 posts
The 2hs is now ber usable

/smacks the lazy buggers at Sony who couldn't take the time to decide what is and isn't a BER weapon and just coded them all.

Epic 1.0 epic 1.5 epic 2.0 AND Jagged Axe of Uncontrolled Rage, the itemization for berserkers is already the worst for any class ever created and introduced into EQ so dont go busting berserkers humps because they can use some of the same weapons as you.

▲ Page top
Raid aggro from it aint bad
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2003 at 1:46 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592258192989
7 posts
By the time your guild is able to kill tunare most of the mobs are gonna either A) be immune to runspeed changes or B) will just resist the proc......that and if it does proc it only lasts about 3 secs, and since everyone should be at max aggro range on mobs only the MT will be getting hit still.... The only problem i have with the sword is when i use it in exp groups, pain in the *** to make people know that closest person has aggro, that and AM ranger dmg gets cut in half due to root. Imo shoulda had a heal proc =P

Turaylon Trueblade
62 paladin - Povar
▲ Page top
Raid aggro from it aint bad

▲ Page top
rarity
QuoteReply
# May 29 2003 at 8:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752925968
Scholar
48 posts
..well.. no with PoP out, this definitely aint the best weap on the shelv.. yet, combine this with primal (just until avatar procs), and you got yourself a nice DPS output. And imho engulfing roots can prove quite useful when soloing, and it got a li'l dd to go with as well.
▲ Page top
epic alternative?!
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2003 at 5:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257368320
View User Forum
14 posts
The proc totally kills the weapon. Can someone explain when you can use this weapon?

I mean, you can't use it soloing if you are fear kiting, you can't use it on raids because it screws up aggro (let's face it when you are raiding with 40+ people the MA will not be able to be closest to the mob all the time), and you have to basically train everyone in your exp groups not to stand close to the mobs if you intend on using it in exp groups.

Other than pvp situations, I can't really imagine a sane time to use it.
▲ Page top
RE: epic alternative?!
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2005 at 10:15 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592260262682
285 posts
a is then dont roll/bid on it. B is that even if an sk is soloing that doesnt mean they have to fear kite. Also take into consideration that even before it was ber usable, it could still be used by pallies. Since pallies dont have snare, this wepon can work nicely in places where the mobs run away, even though u might have to be in combat a little more. Also you have to be pretty decent to get this item, and it as a pc spell gets resisted quite a lot in the higher end just producing more aggro.

rate this post
▲ Page top
RE: epic alternative?!
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2003 at 2:08 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591771596765
49 posts
well, sometimes SK's need a good tank wpn, and 40 ac, 25sta and 100hp realy helps the weak inkys out there abit. the root? why care about the root when there are so many 55+ mobs in pop that are immune to such proc anyways (resists = aggro and must be nice combo with the other taunt spells sk have)

killing allready perm rooted mobs is another thing you can kill with it without being afraid that rogues/ranjas dies..

Edited, Tue Jun 17 02:34:31 2003
▲ Page top
RE: epic alternative?!
QuoteReply
# May 15 2003 at 3:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759939660
33 posts
Depending on the mob and how your guild does positioning( pin mob against wall with MA between ) this wepon is a Kick A** weapon. Yes it hurts your rogues, but if you have pinned the mob against MA and the wall, a rogue can get right up on the mob and backstab. step back one step and do it the rest of the fight. Most Guilds train there Melee to attack from the farthest bosable atack range to minamize agro anyway, so the Root won't make much of a diference as long as you keep the MA alive.

Against non casting mobs( ie mobs that you can park) this weapon is great. If it is a caster, don't even touch it.

It rules in PVP, very low resist, even to a 150 MR player.
▲ Page top
pvp

Hmmm
QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2003 at 5:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776399001
10 posts
Perhaps the Sword has gotten a new graphic, but I recall seeing a Paladin with this sword, and it seemed to look a little like the sword in her hand, but when i saw it, it looked like the Clawed Griffon Sword, or in words, it has a darker blade (Not black, but like darkish gray), and instead of just plain rectangular things on the hilt, there is a Griffon head for each one... hard to describe ;)
▲ Page top
Comentary
QuoteReply
# Jan 11 2003 at 12:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758540313
24 posts
What a wonderful beauty. This sword has a little of everything a paladin wants in a sword. 50/39 is such a great ratio. It pushes the envelope on dmg without being too fast or too slow. The proc? well root isnt good in all situations and VI knew that so they didnt put an dex on the sword. I dont think any other paladin weapon is as balanced as this one. And the best slays I have seen were wielding this sword.

Duke Xaviore Deimos
60/70 Crusader
7th Hammer
▲ Page top
Tunare
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2002 at 2:38 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591784020293
4 posts
Tunare is the EASY fight... Strategy is what you need for the mobs before her in particular Ali the Elder who has a HUGE AE Silence and 400DD and dispels 1 buff. Then you have the Guardians of Tunare which both have 1 million hp and one AE Silences, the other AE DD for 400. Then you got the annoying Thriftling Focusers which are 1 million HP as well. Then your free to beat down Tunare :)
▲ Page top
RE: Tunare
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2003 at 12:55 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591761991555
Scholar
300 posts
From my experience, the Guardians don't have near that many HP, though I may be wrong. Also, the Thifling Focusers are superfluous. You don't need to fight them. Tunare won't summon them if you just leave them alone.
▲ Page top
RE: Tunare
QuoteReply
# Dec 08 2002 at 5:17 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591756918651
99 posts
The Thriftling Focusers don't hit that hard. A single tank with healer can easily keep each one occupied while the rest of the raid kills Tunare.

▲ Page top
i dont understand
QuoteReply
# Nov 05 2002 at 6:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570790257
33 posts
from what i can tell this wep has a better ratio then a goldenrod and i dont see what is so bad about its root proc. i just want someone to spell out to me why a goldenrod is better with no flaming plz thanks
▲ Page top
RE: i dont understand
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2003 at 3:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254106475
6 posts
The reason Goldenrod is more saught after than PHF is that Goldenrod has a few things that give it advantage over Tunare sword.

Goldenrod has 25 more straight hp/mana, which is everything if you have max'd sta than its all about straight hp.

Plus the proc is much much better on Goldenrod. 150lt v 160dd root. I would take the lifetap.

As far as ive seen, the PHF proc doesnt mess things up too badly if the weilder is smart, root isnt that big a pain in the *** hehe.

All in all, both are very nice weapons in their own right.
▲ Page top
RE: i dont understand
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2003 at 3:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254106475
6 posts

# Oct 07 2003 at 9:43 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757711549

Heh none of you understand how badass this weap is especially for the difficulty, and the proc is awsome if you have a brain........ paladins can solo easy with this by jousting, the weilder can get 100% agro by simply being closer to the mob than everyone else.. etc. To get anything better you would have to play 20/7 and be in some uber guild where only thing your allowed to do is raid. Good luck getting to her tho, the silence tree's otw to her are gonna kill you.
